description_long: This is a wooden canoe with a flat-bottomed hull and a pointed bow and stern, featuring a single central mast with two white sails attached. The hull is constructed from dark brown wood, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The mast and spars are also wooden, matching the hull in color and texture. The sails are made of a light, fabric-like material and are slightly curved as if catching wind. The canoe has a long, narrow shape, and there is a protruding wooden element at the stern, possibly representing a rudder or tiller. There are no visible seats, thwarts, or carrying handles, and the interior appears open and unobstructed.
description: A wooden canoe with a central mast and two white sails, featuring a long, narrow hull and a rustic finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden hull, the central mast, and both sails clearly.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow width of the canoe and the alignment of the mast and sails along the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hull, mast, and sails, with the stern's protruding element visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite end, emphasizing the pointed bow and the open interior.
